title: Jadenman Trident
description: This plugin adds a powerful custom trident with boosted damage, special abilities, and a unique crafting recipe that uses player heads, giving servers a strong late‑game or event‑style weapon
body:
Shift‑crafting is blocked so people can’t spam them craft spears.
Whenever someone crafts a spear, the server announces it like:

“Spear 1/3 crafted!”

“Spear 2/3 crafted!”

etc.

It makes the whole thing feel like a server‑wide event.

The Actual Trident
Once someone finally obtains a trident, it becomes the only legitimate trident on the server.
Every 5 seconds the plugin checks everyone’s inventory and deletes any “fake” tridents.

It also:

Can’t go in ender chests

Is fire‑resistant

If it’s ever lost or destroyed, the recipe becomes craftable again

Announces globally when someone finally gets it

Riptide Anywhere
You can riptide:

In water

Out of water

Without rain

Basically whenever you want

If you slam into someone while riptiding, lightning hits them.

Lightning Damage
Riptide collision: 8–10 hearts, shield‑blockable

Normal hit: 70% chance of lightning for 1.5 hearts

Crit hit: 100% chance for 3 hearts

Slam attack (riptide into them): 30% chance to ignore shields

Weapon Stats
Attack speed = sword

Damage = Netherite Sword

Name
§9§lPoseidon’s Trident (dark blue + bold)

Player Heads
Every player drops their own head when they die.
Doesn’t matter how they died — PvP, mobs, fall damage, whatever.
You need heads for the recipe, so this makes PvP way more interesting.

Trust System
Players can add friends to a trust list.
Trusted players don’t take damage from the Trident’s lightning.

Commands (All Have Tab Completion)
/trident give (or /trident give <player>)

/trident disable recipe <Trident|Spear|Mace>

/trident enable recipe <Trident|Spear|Mace>

/trident remove

/trident trust add/remove/list

/trident limit remove <trident|spear>

/trident head

/trident recipe

ADDED A FEW OF MY OWN PARTS AS NOTICEABLE. FOR THE FULL THING CHECK JADENMANS’ ACTUAL VIDEO AT:  
https://youtu.be/RntfFsMVVgo?si=8XxtnsWt4tpjt38D

ANOTHER THING — IF ANY EXPERIENCED RESOURCEPACK CREATORS COULD CONTACT ME AT "cmtechhy" ON DISCORD AND HELP ME CREATE A RESOURCEPACK FOR THIS, IT WOULD BE GREATLY APPRECIATED.
